title: Baramon: Gotta Fu*k 'em All
description:
ATTENTION: Baramon launches with the complete Version 1.0 experience. While the world of Baramon has room for many more adventures, this release includes all content planned for Version 1.0.

Fuck as many Baramons as you can!In the world of Baramon, young trainers — known as Bara Chasers — begin their journey not just to catch, but to connect deeply with powerful humanoid creatures called Baramon. These beings, desired for their strength (and their... other assets), live far from humans, resisting contact after generations of being misunderstood and objectified.

But thanks to Dr. Phil’s invention, the Bara Sphere, things are changing. For the first time, humans can form real bonds with Baramon. You’ll play as one of the first Bara Chasers — chosen by the doctor himself — and set off on a mission to protect these creatures, study them, and stop those who would abuse the tech for darker purposes.

Inspired by the Pokémon SNEZ edition

Traditional Turn-Based Game

More than 20 H-scenes to unlock

More than 15 baramons to capture

More than 15 hours of gameplay to unlock the whole content

3 Bara Gurus (Gym leaders)

Milking System (extract milk from your Baramon and insert it into another to make a unique combination)
description_short: Baramon is a monster-catcher game mix with dating sim elements and a lewd flavor. Catch your Baramon, extract milk from them, and inject it into another one for a unique combination of skills.
